label_encoding.note: Training uses thesis labels; LinRegDroid2 applies paper nearest-class geometry at inference.

decision_rules.linregdroid2: malware if |ŷ - 0| > |ŷ - 1| in paper label space (mapped to thesis labels)

score_output.paper_note: Paper reports unbounded ŷ; mobile ONNX uses clamped probability for stable thresholds.

ensemble_note: Paper Ensemble-1 (5× MLR bootstrap) and Ensemble-2 (MLR+SVM+trees) not implemented; single MLR baseline for thesis comparison.

inputs.name: permissions
inputs.description: Binary permission vector aligned with features/permission_vocab.json

outputs.name: malware_probability
outputs.description: Malware probability in [0, 1] (clamp of linear score)
